title: hieracium doronicifolium subsp. perfixum
intro: Hieracium doronicifolium subsp. perfixum is a plant species, also known as hawkweed, that belongs to the dandelion family and is commonly found in mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Hieracium doronicifolium subsp. perfixum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to act as a natural antioxidant and immune system booster. Hieracium doronicifolium subsp. perfixum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent diseases.
